PowerShell(python -c "import json; from graphify.detect import detect; from pathlib import Path; result = detect\(Path\('.'\)\); print\(json.dumps\(result\)\)" > .graphify_detect.json; python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('.graphify_detect.json'\)\); print\('total_files:', d.get\('total_files'\)\); print\('total_words:', d.get\('total_words'\)\); print\('categories:', {k:len\(v\) for k,v in d.get\('files',{}\).items\(\)}\); print\('skipped_sensitive:', len\(d.get\('skipped_sensitive', []\)\)\)")

PowerShell(python -c "import json; from graphify.detect import detect; from pathlib import Path; result = detect\(Path\('.'\)\); open\('.graphify_detect.json','w',encoding='utf-8'\).write\(json.dumps\(result\)\); print\('total_files:', result.get\('total_files'\)\); print\('total_words:', result.get\('total_words'\)\); print\('categories:', {k:len\(v\) for k,v in result.get\('files',{}\).items\(\)}\); print\('skipped_sensitive:', len\(result.get\('skipped_sensitive', []\)\)\)")
